title: Ronin NFT Inventory
description: List all NFTs held in a Ronin wallet — Axie Infinity, Land, and other Sky Mavis NFT collections. Uses getNftsForAddress on axie-mainnet.
useCase: Build a Ronin wallet NFT viewer showing all Axie Infinity, Land, and Sky Mavis NFT collections held by any Ronin address — the foundation for Axie portfolio apps.

keyParams.walletAddress: Ronin wallet address (0x format or ronin: prefix stripped)
